casepack.title: Standard Model Demonstration Stub
casepack.description: Minimal Tier-1 demonstration unit for the standard_model domain. Full closure code lives in closures/standard_model/ (subatomic kernel, 27 proven theorems, CKM/PMNS mixing, matter genesis); this casepack is a placeholder packaging demonstration.

run_intent.notes: Stub demonstration unit for the standard_model domain. Three uniform channels at c=0.99 yield a Stable regime under canon thresholds. Pending replacement with domain-specific raw measurements drawn from the closure code in closures/standard_model/.
